channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran says wars are not won on social media
item.description: A spokesperson for Iran's Central Headquarters said wars are decided on the battlefield, not social media.

item.title: Attempts to open Strait of Hormuz by force would be ‘almost suicidal’
item.description: Andreas Krieg says that US plans to deploy 2,500 marines to the Gulf is unlikely to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of air strike on drug rehab centre
item.description: Afghan officials say a Pakistani air strike has killed hundreds of people at a drug rehabilitation centre.

item.title: Many killed, wounded after blasts hit Nigeria’s Maiduguri, witnesses say
item.description: Police deploy explosives' clearance teams to three sites following suspected suicide attacks in the northeastern city.

item.title: Scores of people killed in series of bomb blasts in northern Nigeria
item.description: Footage shows the aftermath of deadly blasts in Maiduguri in northeastern Nigeria.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump scolds allies for not joining Strait of Hormuz mission
item.description: US President Donald Trump criticises allies' reluctance to commit forces to open the key waterway for Gulf oil exports.

item.title: Hotel in Iraqi capital Baghdad struck as attacks on US embassy intercepted
item.description: No group has claimed responsibility for the attacks, which took place amid the escalating Israel-US war on Iran.

item.title: Trump claims strikes on Iran prevented nuclear war
item.description: Donald Trump claimed he ordered strikes on Iran to prevent a nuclear conflict that would have turned into World War III.

item.title: Trump seeks to delay meeting with China’s Xi by ‘month or so’ amid Iran war
item.description: The US president delays March 31-April 2 trip to China to focus on the escalating war against Iran.

item.title: Ten ICU patients killed in hospital fire in eastern India
item.description: Emergency responders carried patients out of a government hospital in Odisha, India.
